title: Nezumi Steals Nami’s Hope
scene: On pages 17–18, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Nami tries to cut herself off from Luffy’s crew while Zoro and the others see that something is wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's useless.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No matter what you do, you won't be able to change Arlong's rule.

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Nojiko.

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Who's she?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She's Nami's sister.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: N-N-N-N-N-N-N-N-N-N-N-N-Nami's sister!?\\ well, it's no wonder why she's so beautiful then!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What do you mean useless?

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Please don't involve yourselves with this village any further.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'll tell you all about how things got this way,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So in return, I want you to just leave quietly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A Marine ship is docked at the shore!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's the 16th branch!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: could they have come to investigate,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What happened to the 77"# branch ship that came by earlier...?

dialogue.speaker: Marine Captain Nezumi
dialogue.text: chichichichi... I'm CPT. Nezumi of the Marines 16th branch.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Bring me the man named Genzo who lives here in Cocoyashi Village!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That'd be me. What do you want, Captain?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're Genzo?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: guide me to the house,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: belonging to the woman named Nami.

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
